items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: A button component with action presets, icon support, auto-tooltips, and loading state.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: A card container component with header, content, and footer sections.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A table component with header, body, row, and cell sub-components.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: A visual divider between content sections.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: A slide-out panel overlay component.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays information related to an element on hover or focus.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: A menu of actions or options triggered by a button.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: A component that expands and collapses content.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing a user.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog overlay for confirmations, forms, and focused interactions.

items.name: modal
items.title: Modal
items.description: An opinionated modal with sticky header, scrollable body, and sticky footer built on Dialog.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: A styled text input field for forms.

items.name: search-input
items.title: Search Input
items.description: A search input with icon, optional clear button, and built-in debounce for filtering lists.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: An accessible label for form controls.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: A small status indicator with multiple variants.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: A dropdown select input built on Radix UI.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: A floating content popover triggered by a button or element.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: A date calendar component with single, multiple, and range selection modes.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: A single date picker with calendar popover.

items.name: date-range-picker
items.title: Date Range Picker
items.description: A dual date picker with quick-select panels for selecting date ranges.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: A command menu component built on cmdk for searchable lists and command palettes.

items.name: select-picker
items.title: Select Picker
items.description: A searchable select picker supporting single and multiple selection with type-safe discriminated union props.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A checkbox input with checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: A multi-line text input field for forms.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: Form components with field context, validation, and accessible labels built on react-hook-form.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: A set of mutually exclusive radio options.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A toggle switch for boolean on/off states.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: An animated placeholder for loading content.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog for confirmations requiring user acknowledgement.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: A callout for displaying important messages with default, destructive, and info variants.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: A navigation breadcrumb trail with links, separator, and ellipsis support.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: A custom scrollable area with styled scrollbars.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: A progress bar indicating completion status.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of expandable content sections.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: A two-state button that can be toggled on or off.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: A group of toggle buttons supporting single or multiple selection.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: A range slider input with single and dual thumb support.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A tabbed interface component with default and line variants, supporting horizontal and vertical orientations.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Sonner
items.description: A toast notification component powered by sonner with theme-aware styling.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: A page navigation component with previous, next, page links, and ellipsis.

items.name: app-shell
items.title: App Shell
items.description: A data-driven layout component with collapsible sidebar, header bar, and user menu.

items.name: filter-bar
items.title: Filter Bar
items.description: Two composable filter components: FilterButton trigger and ActiveFilters chips display with operators, supporting option lists, dates, and text search.

items.name: split-button
items.title: Split Button
items.description: A compound split button with a primary action and a dropdown chevron for secondary actions.

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page Header
items.description: A page header with title, description, and action buttons slot for consistent page layouts.

items.name: detail-page
items.title: Detail Page
items.description: A compound layout component for resource detail pages with header, 2-column content area, metadata sidebar, and copyable meta items.

items.name: attachment-input
items.title: Attachment Input
items.description: A file attachment input with dropzone and compact variants, supporting single and multiple file modes with validation.

items.name: selectable-card
items.title: Selectable Card
items.description: A composable card component for single (radio) or multi (checkbox) selection with size variants.

items.name: code-label
items.title: Code Label
items.description: An inline monospace label with a copy-to-clipboard button, useful for displaying IDs, commands, and code snippets.

items.name: loading-page
items.title: Loading Page
items.description: A full-screen loading state with optional logo, animated dots, and customizable message.

items.name: animated-number
items.title: Animated Number
items.description: A number display that animates smoothly between values using requestAnimationFrame with easeOutQuad easing.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: A horizontal multi-step progress indicator with completed, current, and pending states.

items.name: connection-banner
items.title: Connection Banner
items.description: A fixed top banner that shows when the app loses connectivity, with a retry button.

items.name: error-fallback
items.title: Error Fallback
items.description: An error boundary fallback with root (full-screen + reload) and route (inline + custom action) variants.

items.name: expandable-text
items.title: Expandable Text
items.description: A text component that collapses long content with configurable visible lines, using pre for newline support.

items.name: avatar-group
items.title: Avatar Group
items.description: A horizontal stack of overlapping Avatars with configurable max count and a +N overflow tile. Inherits the Avatar's circle/square shape.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: Centered empty-state block with icon, title, optional description, and optional action slot. Three sizes (sm, md, lg).

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: Dashboard stat tile composed from Card, AnimatedNumber, and Badge. Supports an optional icon, suffix, hint, and a trend chip with up/down/flat tones.

items.name: meter-row
items.title: Meter Row
items.description: Labeled horizontal bar with optional trailing value and per-row tone (default, success, warning, info, destructive, muted). Use for status/priority charts and small dashboards.

items.name: list-row
items.title: List Row
items.description: Avatar/icon + title + subtitle + trailing-meta layout primitive. Renders as a div by default; pass asButton for keyboard-accessible clickable rows. Density (sm/default/lg) and surface (plain/bordered/muted) variants.

items.name: _all
items.title: All Components
items.description: Meta-component that installs the entire pandaworks-ui registry via registryDependencies. Auto-generated by scripts/sync-all-meta.mjs — do not edit by hand.
